text:
Four PRs landed in the hive today.

The model table now explains itself, access labels remain near the thing they describe, GPT Realtime 2.1 is the default, and the README has been gently brought into the present.

Mostly small maintenance work. Which is how software avoids becoming an archaeological site. 🌱🐝

Details in the repo: github.com/pollinations/pollinations
